data.title: HTTPS Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data transmitted between users and the website is encrypted.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent audits to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Use of automated security scanning tools.

data.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Protection
data.description: Implements measures to thwart XSS attacks on user data.
data.technical_spec: Content Security Policy (CSP) headers and sanitization of input data.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protects against distributed denial of service attacks to maintain site availability.

data.title: Authentication and Session Management
data.description: Utilizes robust methods for user authentication and session handling.
